short_summary: Iran deal near, NATO cuts, SpaceX
rationale: The Iran deal inching closer is the most consequential story for Americans — potential oil price relief and a major foreign policy outcome; NATO cuts continue as a domestic policy debate; SpaceX Nasdaq debut is a notable market event.

top_events.title: Iran says deal with US has 'never been closer' / Iran FM confirms no timeline yet
top_events.summary: A US-Iran deal would be a major Trump foreign policy win, potentially lowering gas prices for Americans and reducing Middle East military commitments, though no signing date is set.

top_events.title: US to cut air and naval assets deployed for NATO operations in Europe
top_events.summary: Ongoing US military retrenchment from Europe reflects active Trump policy; domestic debate continues over long-term security costs and allied burden-sharing.

top_events.title: Musk becomes first trillionaire as SpaceX debuts on Nasdaq
top_events.summary: SpaceX's Nasdaq listing is a landmark US market event; relevant to American investors and signals continued tech-sector momentum, though no systemic market shock.
